summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new signup flows for The Drop app. All 27 backend tests passed (100%). Both Flow A (Under 14, parent-led) and Flow B (14+, self signup) are fully functional with UI/UX working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/auth/check-username/testname returns availability status
Backend: GET /api/auth/check-username/ab returns invalid format with reason
Backend: GET /api/auth/check-username/hansel returns taken (existing user)
Backend: Username with @ prefix is stripped and checked
Backend: POST /api/auth/register-child with valid data returns token and user with account_type='child'
Backend: Child age <= 10 gets age_group '8-10'
Backend: Child age 11-13 gets age_group '11-13'
Backend: register-child rejects age >= 14
Backend: register-child rejects password < 8 chars
Backend: register-child rejects duplicate email
Backend: POST /api/auth/register-self with valid data returns token and user with account_type='self'
Backend: Self signup age 14-16 gets age_group '14-16'
Backend: Self signup age 17+ gets age_group '17-20'
Backend: register-self rejects age < 14
Backend: register-self rejects duplicate username
Backend: register-self rejects duplicate email
Backend: register-self rejects invalid username format (< 3 chars)
Backend: register-self rejects short password
Backend: GET /api/auth/user-by-invite/{username} returns public profile (username lookup)
Backend: GET /api/auth/user-by-invite/{invite_code} returns public profile (invite code lookup)
Backend: user-by-invite returns 404 for nonexistent user
Backend: POST /api/auth/login works for existing users
Backend: Login rejects invalid credentials
Backend: Login rejects nonexistent user
Backend: PUT /api/auth/me can update avatar_url
Backend: PUT /api/auth/me rejects taken username
Frontend: Age gate page loads with age input and continue button
Frontend: Login link accessible from age gate page
Frontend: Entering age < 14 starts Flow A (parent-led)
Frontend: Entering age >= 14 starts Flow B (self signup)
Frontend: Flow A Step 1 - Parent details form with all fields
Frontend: Flow A Step 2 - Child profile with age badge auto-assigned
Frontend: Flow A Step 3 - Avatar selection with 8 DiceBear adventurer avatars
Frontend: Flow A complete signup creates account and redirects to feed
Frontend: Flow B Step 1 - Basic details form with all fields
Frontend: Flow B Step 2 - Username input with live availability check (shows 'taken' or 'available')
Frontend: Flow B Step 2 - Avatar selection working
Frontend: Flow B Welcome screen shows avatar, 'You're in.', and top stories preview
Frontend: Flow B complete signup redirects to feed with correct country articles
Frontend: Login form loads and accepts credentials
Frontend: Login redirects to feed on success

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all signup flows and UI elements working)

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users during backend tests with email patterns: testparent{timestamp}@test.com, selfteen{timestamp}@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both signup flows (Flow A: Under 14 parent-led, Flow B: 14+ self signup) are fully implemented and working. Key data-testids: age-gate-input, age-gate-continue, age-gate-login-link, flow-a-back, parent-name-input, parent-email-input, parent-password-input, consent-guardian-checkbox, consent-terms-checkbox, flow-a-step1-next, child-name-input, child-age-input, child-country-selector, flow-a-step2-next, avatar-option-0-7, flow-a-submit, flow-b-back, self-name-input, self-email-input, self-password-input, self-age-input, self-country-selector, flow-b-step1-next, self-username-input, self-consent-terms, flow-b-submit, welcome-go-to-feed, login-back, login-email, login-password, login-submit-btn. DiceBear avatars use adventurer style from api.dicebear.com/9.x/adventurer/svg.

features_verified.age_gate: ✅ Working - routes to correct flow based on age
features_verified.flow_b_self_signup: ✅ Complete 2-step signup for 14+ with welcome screen
features_verified.age_group_badges: ✅ Auto-assigned based on age (Junior Reader, News Scout, Drop Regular, Sharp Mind)
features_verified.country_selector: ✅ Shows all 20 countries with flag emojis
features_verified.welcome_screen: ✅ Shows avatar, message, and top stories preview for Flow B

mocked_apis.parent_confirmation_email: MOCKED - console.log only, no real email sent
